mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_logs ( user_uuid, study_date, total_seconds, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, CURRENT_DATE, #{studySeconds}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_uuid, study_date) DO UPDATE SET total_seconds = study_logs.total_seconds + EXCLUDED.total_seconds, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT total_seconds FROM study_logs WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND study_date = CURRENT_DATE), 0 )

SELECT log_no AS logNo, user_uuid AS userUuid, study_date AS studyDate, total_seconds AS totalSeconds, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM study_logs WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM study_date) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM study_date) = #{month} ORDER BY study_date
